identity.name: Existing Skill
identity.description: Improve an existing result through a bounded feedback loop.

purpose.outcome: repair the result until the approved check passes

use_when: an existing result needs evidence-driven repair
do_not_use_when: the result already passes the approved check

cycle.observe: Read the target and latest check evidence.
cycle.record: Record the repair and check evidence.
cycle.adapt: Use fresh evidence to continue or stop.

terminal_states.blocked: Required evidence or authority is missing.
terminal_states.stagnated: Fresh evidence no longer changes the next action.
terminal_states.exhausted: The approved repair budget is exhausted.
